name: windows_service
explanation: The check runs on the local Windows host and queries the Service Control Manager (win32service.OpenSCManager / EnumServicesStatusEx). There is no remote network probe. The required `services` list specifies which services to monitor; the user can pass `ALL` to enumerate every registered service, in which case discovery is purely 'is this Windows?' and the check trivially populates targets from SCM. Auto-config can default the instance to `services: [ALL]` on any Windows host where the Agent is installed.
notes: Same pattern as iis: local Windows host detection rather than network probing. Default-enabling with `services: [ALL]` may be too noisy for production - users typically want a curated list - but technical feasibility is high.
